summary: Frontend e2e testing for MVELO Trading Enterprise marketing site. Verified all 12 requested behaviors via Playwright on the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Hero, sticky header, nav scrolls, header CTA, 17 services grid, reviews 4.6 heading, quote form happy-path (POST /api/quotes -> 201 -> quote-success state), empty-form validation toast, all tel:+27658051448 / wa.me/27658051448 testids, address occurrences (3 places: hero, contact, footer), and mobile menu toggle (5 nav links + call/whatsapp). All passing.

issues: Logo wordmark text 'MMVELO' reads as duplicated 'M' when concatenated (yellow square 'M' tile + 'MVELO' text). Visually fine but semantic text content is 'MMVELOTrading Enterprise'. Not a bug, just minor accessibility note.

critical_code_review_comments: QuoteForm.jsx phone input has no client-side format validation (e.g., min length, digit pattern). Backend currently accepts any string. Low priority for marketing site.
FloatingCTA appears overlapping at bottom-right; ensure it doesn't obstruct WhatsApp/Call tap targets on small screens (visually OK in 390x844 test).
Filler cells in Services grid are decorative-only on xl breakpoint; harmless but adds DOM nodes.
seed_data_creation: Submitted one TEST_-prefixed quote ('TEST_Auto Tester' / 'Floor fitting') via the live form to verify integration. Returns 201 from POST /api/quotes.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 12 requested frontend behaviors verified passing on https://mvelo-soweto.preview.emergentagent.com. For Radix Select interaction, use [role='option'] selectors (clicking by text 'Floor fitting' may match other elements). Sonner toasts use [data-sonner-toast] selector. Mobile menu testid is 'mobile-menu-toggle' and 'mobile-menu'. Quote form happy path: fill field-name, field-phone, open field-service Radix Select, click an option, submit. Success state is data-testid='quote-success'.
rca_of_the_issue: No issues found. Two initial 'failures' in combined test were due to test sequencing (Radix Select option selector ambiguity and viewport change after long flow); both passed when run isolated.
